email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Digital Marketeer bij Dataline. Uw focus op innovatie in de grafische sector en de combinatie van creativiteit, technologie en data sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketeer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met structured data, entity optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben vertrouwd met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Dataline is de ruimte om te experimenteren en impact te maken. Ik ben leergierig, resultaatgericht en werk graag samen met collega's uit verschillende disciplines. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdevelopment en mijn groeiende kennis van AI-tools stellen mij in staat om snel bij te dragen aan uw marketingteam.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie en ervaring toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Marketeer position at Dataline. Your focus on innovation in the graphic industry and the combination of creativity, technology, and data aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketeer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I have gained experience with structured data, entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am familiar with tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console.

What appeals to me at Dataline is the space to experiment and make an impact. I am eager to learn, results-driven, and enjoy collaborating with colleagues from different disciplines. My technical background in web development and my growing knowledge of AI tools enable me to contribute quickly to your marketing team.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I would be happy to elaborate on my motivation and experience in a personal meeting.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Digital Marketeer bij Dataline. Uw missie om de toekomst van de grafische industrie in Europa te bouwen, gecombineerd met een focus op innovatie, data en storytelling, spreekt mij enorm aan. Als junior digital marketer met een technische basis in webdesign, SEO en GEO, geloof ik dat ik een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra. Ik werk dagelijks met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te monitoren en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) om zichtbaarheid te verbeteren in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines. Dit sluit naadloos aan bij uw focus op AI Search Optimization en conversie-intelligentie.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Dataline is de ruimte om te experimenteren en écht verschil te maken. Ik ben resultaatgericht, neem initiatief en werk graag samen met collega's uit marketing, sales en development. Mijn technische achtergrond in front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) geeft mij een uniek perspectief bij het optimaliseren van customer journeys en conversie. Ik ben nieuwsgierig naar AI en automation, en gebruik tools zoals ChatGPT en Claude om contentcreatie te versnellen zonder in te boeten aan kwaliteit.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring verder toe te lichten in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Marketeer position at Dataline. Your mission to build the future of the graphic industry in Europe, combined with a focus on innovation, data, and storytelling, greatly appeals to me. As a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, I believe I can make a valuable contribution to your team.

In my current role at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra. I work daily with tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to monitor and optimize performance. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I have gained experience with structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This aligns perfectly with your focus on AI Search Optimization and conversion intelligence.

What appeals to me at Dataline is the space to experiment and truly make a difference. I am results-driven, take initiative, and enjoy collaborating with colleagues from marketing, sales, and development. My technical background in front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) gives me a unique perspective when optimizing customer journeys and conversion. I am curious about AI and automation, and I use tools like ChatGPT and Claude to accelerate content creation without compromising quality.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible. I look forward to elaborating on my motivation and experience in a conversation.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• SEO & GEO expertise: on-page SEO, structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, GEO/AEO for AI search visibility
• WordPress development: building and maintaining sites with Elementor, Astra, including full-cycle content management
• Content creation: writing keyword-targeted blog content and editorial content for SEO growth
• Analytics & tools: SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Search Console, Google Ads for performance tracking
• Technical foundation: front-end development experience (AngularJS, JavaScript) supporting conversion optimization
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
